text.title: UAT Script Pattern Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of UAT Script Pattern.

example.scenario: Release v2.1 of a comment-system: 4 ACs → 11 numbered steps; tester @alex runs through; logs 11 passes + 1 defect; release signed off.
example.trace: preconditions=true → procedure applied → artefact emitted → validate-script passes
